name: Global Aerospace Stack
description: Global aerospace strategic dependency graph across aircraft, engines, space, regulation, suppliers, MRO and opportunity zones.

name: Airframer / OEM Layer
description: Commercial, business, defence and regional aircraft manufacturers.

name: Engine / Propulsion Layer
description: Turbofan, turboprop, rotorcraft, launch and future propulsion systems.

name: Aerostructures / Materials Layer
description: Fuselage, wings, composite structures, forgings, castings, titanium, aluminum and advanced materials.

name: Avionics / Flight Systems Layer
description: Avionics, cockpit systems, flight controls, navigation, communication, sensors and software assurance.

name: Landing Gear / Actuation Layer
description: Landing gear, braking, hydraulic, electrical, actuation and motion-control systems.

name: Cabin / Interiors Layer
strategic_role: Cabin systems and passenger experience layer
description: Seats, cabin systems, galleys, lavatories, connectivity and passenger experience equipment.

name: MRO / Aftermarket Layer
description: Engine shop visits, spares, repairs, component maintenance, line maintenance, predictive maintenance and lifecycle services.

name: Certification / Regulation Layer
description: Type certification, continued airworthiness, safety rules, software certification and regulator approval.

name: Air Traffic / Airline Operations Layer
description: Air traffic management, airline operations, dispatch, flight planning, airport constraints, slots and connectivity.

name: Space Launch Layer
description: Launch vehicles, launch services, propulsion, pads, range access and mission integration.

name: Satellite / Space Systems Layer
description: Satellites, payloads, satellite buses, space systems, constellations and ground segments.

name: Sustainable Aviation Layer
description: SAF, hydrogen, hybrid-electric, electric aircraft, contrails, lightweighting and operational efficiency.

name: Aerospace Software / Data Layer
description: Digital thread, PLM, simulation, certification evidence, health monitoring, flight data, cybersecurity and operational analytics.

name: Aerospace Supply Chain Visibility Layer
description: Multi-tier supplier visibility, lead times, quality escapes, capacity, certification status and geopolitical exposure.

name: EASA
description: EU aviation safety agency responsible for safety regulation/certification in Europe.

name: FAA
description: US aviation regulator responsible for civil aviation safety and certification.

name: ICAO
description: International Civil Aviation Organization creates international civil aviation standards and recommended practices.

name: IATA
description: Global airline trade association relevant to airline operations, safety, sustainability and commercial aviation demand.

name: EUROCONTROL
description: European air traffic management organization.

name: ESA
description: European space agency and major programme/customer node for space systems.

name: NASA
description: US space agency and major space systems/customer node.

name: Boeing
description: Commercial aircraft, defence, space and services.

name: Embraer

name: COMAC

name: Dassault Aviation

name: Bombardier

name: Gulfstream Aerospace
description: Business aviation aircraft manufacturer.

name: Textron Aviation

name: Leonardo Aeronautics

name: GE Aerospace

name: Safran Aircraft Engines
description: Aircraft engines and support; Safran group engine node.

name: CFM International

name: Rolls-Royce Civil Aerospace
description: Civil aerospace engines and services.

name: Pratt & Whitney
description: Aircraft engines and propulsion systems.

name: MTU Aero Engines

name: ArianeGroup
description: Ariane launch vehicle and space propulsion ecosystem.

name: Blue Origin
description: Launch vehicles, engines and space systems.

name: Collins Aerospace
description: Aerospace systems supplier across avionics, interiors, mission systems and aircraft systems.

name: Honeywell Aerospace
description: Aerospace products, services, software, navigation, support and customer portal.

name: Thales Aerospace
description: Aerospace avionics, connectivity, air traffic management and flight systems.

name: Safran
description: Engines, equipment, landing systems, interiors and avionics/electrical systems.

name: Liebherr Aerospace
description: Landing gear, flight control, air management and actuation systems.

name: Parker Aerospace
description: Aerospace motion and control systems.

name: Moog Aircraft
description: Aircraft flight control and actuation systems.

name: Spirit AeroSystems

name: GKN Aerospace
description: Aerospace systems and structures supplier.

name: Leonardo Aerostructures
description: Aerostructures and aircraft manufacturing support.

name: SITA

name: Satcom Direct
description: Business aviation connectivity and data services.

name: Flightradar24

name: SpaceX
description: Launch services, spacecraft and Starlink constellation.

name: Rocket Lab
description: Small launch and space systems provider.

name: Arianespace

name: Eutelsat Group
description: European satellite connectivity operator including GEO/LEO assets.

name: SES
description: Satellite communications provider.

name: Intelsat
description: Satellite communications provider.

name: Thales Alenia Space
description: Satellite and space infrastructure systems company.

name: OHB
description: Space systems and technology group.

name: Airbus Space Systems
description: Airbus space products and services including satellites, exploration, ground systems and equipment.

name: Boeing Space Systems
description: Boeing space systems and satellites.

name: Engine MRO Capacity
description: Engine maintenance, spare parts, shop slots and lifecycle support capacity.

name: Castings / Forgings Capacity
description: Large castings, forgings, discs, blades, shafts, structural parts and qualified supplier capacity.

name: Titanium / Specialty Metals Dependency
description: Titanium, nickel superalloys, aluminum, composites, resins and specialty metals supply exposure.

name: Semiconductor / Avionics Electronics Dependency
description: Flight computers, avionics, sensors, navigation, comms and supply of certified electronics.

name: Certification Bottleneck
description: Type certification, software certification, continued airworthiness, production approval and regulatory capacity.

name: Skilled Aerospace Workforce
description: Engineers, technicians, machinists, maintenance staff, certification specialists and software assurance talent.

name: Quality Escape / Traceability Risk
description: Non-conformance, counterfeit parts, paperwork gaps, supplier quality escapes and traceability failures.

name: SAF Supply Constraint
description: SAF availability, feedstock, certification, price and logistics constraints.

name: Hydrogen Infrastructure Gap
description: Hydrogen production, storage, airport infrastructure, safety, certification and aircraft integration.

name: Aviation Cybersecurity Risk
strategic_role: Connected aircraft and operations cyber risk
description: Aircraft software, airline operations, connectivity, satcom, ground systems and maintenance data cyber exposure.

name: Airspace / Airport Capacity Constraint
description: Airspace congestion, airport slots, ATM modernization and operational disruption exposure.

name: Launch Cadence / Range Constraint
description: Launch cadence, range availability, propulsion, pads, payload integration and regulatory access.
